---
title: Matrix visualization
jupyter: python3
---



### Set up and get data

```{python}
## Import modules
import os
import abct
import numpy as np
from scipy import io
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.subplots as sp
from utils import get_cmap

## Unpack data
data = io.loadmat(os.path.join(".", "data", "hcp_data.mat"))
ord_conn = data["order_conn"].flatten() - 1
ord_coact = data["order_coact"].flatten() - 1
cmap_conn = get_cmap(data["cmap_yellowheat"])
cmap_coact = get_cmap(data["cmap_gouldian"])
```

### Compute connectivity and co-activity matrices

```{python}
## Compute connectivity matrices
connectivity = data["connectivity"]

conn = dict()
conn["Original"] = connectivity
conn["Degree-corrected"] = abct.moderemoval(connectivity, "degree")
conn["Co-neighbor"] = abct.coneighbors(connectivity)

## Compute co-activity matrices
activity = data["activity"]
coactivity = activity.T @ activity

coact = dict()
coact["Original"] = coactivity
coact["Degree-corrected"] = abct.moderemoval(coactivity, "degree")
coact["Co-neighbor"] = abct.coneighbors(coactivity)
```

### Visualize connectivity matrices

```{python}
zmin = (0, -0.005, 0)
zmax = (0.01, 0.005, 36)
for i, name in enumerate(conn):
    fig = px.imshow(
        conn[name][np.ix_(ord_conn, ord_conn)], 
        title=f"{name} connectivity matrix",
        color_continuous_scale=cmap_conn,
        zmin=zmin[i], zmax=zmax[i],
        width=600, height=600)
    fig.update_layout(title_x=0.5).show()
```

### Visualize co-activity matrices

```{python}
zmin = (0, -0.2, 0)
zmax = (1, 0.2, 36)
for i, name in enumerate(coact):
    fig = px.imshow(
        coact[name][np.ix_(ord_coact, ord_coact)], 
        title=f"{name} co-activity matrix",
        color_continuous_scale=cmap_coact,
        zmin=zmin[i], zmax=zmax[i],
        width=600, height=600)
    fig.update_layout(title_x=0.5).show()
```
